cluster_profiles.persuasive_function: Constructs the German people as a racial organism whose purity must be preserved against contamination and dissolution.
rival_readings: Battle-victory is extended to denote the triumph of races, ideologies, or laws of nature; the competitive combat source domain is applied to politics and biology.
Biological blood is extended to denote racial descent and inherited essence; the physical source domain underwrites racial-purity claims.
Fate does not literally strike with a hammer, make decisions, or lead people; it is cast as an intentional agent.
German `Schicksal` here may be a conventional expression for life-lot rather than a live personification.
Individual mind is extended to collective cultural/civilizational agency; abstract spirit becomes a force that builds or degrades civilizations.
Individual soul is extended to collective psychological disposition; the collective soul becomes something that political actors can capture or poison.
Physical soil is extended to denote an organic territorial right; space becomes a biological necessity for the Volk.
The botanical act of rooting out is extended to human elimination; the physical source domain is preserved in the compound.
The exploited population is cast as a sacrificial victim consumed by a predatory agent.
negative_cases: Volk/racial-body language naturalizes what are political constructions; the biological framing should not be accepted as description.
cluster_profiles.relation_to_koenigsbergian_analysis: The Volk is the sacred object; its preservation against contamination is the law that legitimizes sacrifice and elimination.

cluster_profiles.persuasive_function: Makes Hitler the personal embodiment of the Volk's destiny, concentrating all agency and authority in his person.
rival_readings: Individual honor is extended to national-collective honor as a possessable, transferable property; the Reich's honor can be restored like a physical object.
Individual soldiers or citizens are idealized through the hero category; heroism becomes the organizing concept for military self-sacrifice.
negative_cases: Führer-embodiment is an ideological construction; the corpus does not record resistance, dissent, or the coercive apparatus sustaining it.
cluster_profiles.relation_to_koenigsbergian_analysis: The Führer is both the sacred object's guardian and its expression; sacrifice for him is sacrifice for the Volk.

cluster_profiles.persuasive_function: Dehumanizes Jewish people as a pathological threat requiring removal, making genocide imaginable as hygiene.
rival_readings: Physical destruction is extended to social/economic/racial elimination; the basic physical sense underwrites the metaphorical application to groups.
negative_cases: This cluster is not an analytic category but a record of genocidal ideology; its 'function' is the construction of the conditions for mass murder.
cluster_profiles.relation_to_koenigsbergian_analysis: Activates the enemy-as-bringer-of-death dimension at its most extreme: the enemy is not a rival people but a pathogen requiring elimination.

cluster_profiles.persuasive_function: Converts political violence and death in the Nazi cause into sacred martyrdom, creating a cult of sacrificial obligation.
political_actions_authorized: continued violence in the movement's name
elimination of enemies who caused the martyrs' deaths
rival_readings: The individual gives up their ego/advantage to the community; this is not a religious ritual but is structured as one.
negative_cases: Martyrdom framing in this corpus is most developed in the Mein Kampf chapters; the public proclamations are more functional and less hagiographic.
cluster_profiles.relation_to_koenigsbergian_analysis: Directly activates the sacrificial-body dimension: movement dead become the sacred debt that authorizes further violence.
